unreleased: Add GET /api/public/release-news endpoint, exposing release_news.json for the frontend's release news page

changes: FastAPI backend with an async Postgres stack (SQLAlchemy + asyncpg), Alembic migrations, time-rotating logging, and a parametrizable email service
Backend-for-frontend proxy to the shared auth.withfbraun.com identity service: register, login, refresh, logout, local RS256 JWT verification, Google OAuth support
Custom in-app consent flow (group-info, grant/reject) instead of the auth service's hosted consent page
Local account resource (GET/PATCH /api/account/me) kept strictly separate from the auth-service-proxied profile endpoints
Profile updates and configurable per-application user attributes via the group-attributes endpoints
Public /api/public/version endpoint for build and deployment health checks
